cost_name: Alkaline Stack Cost — Hyoffwind 25 MW Project — Belgium 2024

estimation.estimation_method: Estimated from Hyoffwind total CAPEX (€72M all-in for 25 MW). Electrolyzer portion estimated at ~17% of all-in based on IEA/IRENA cost breakdown for 25 MW Alkaline plants. John Cockerill pressurized Alkaline (4 × 6.25 MW).

confidence.rationale: Total CAPEX is Level A (Virya Energy disclosure). Stack proportion is DERIVED. The €500/kW estimate is based on cost breakdown norms for small-scale Alkaline. John Cockerill is a European OEM — costs reflect Western manufacturing.

primary_drivers: John Cockerill pressurized Alkaline (up to 30 bar) — premium over atmospheric
exclusions: Owner's costs and contingency included in total €72M

sources.title: Hyoffwind — Belgium's first green hydrogen plant: €72M total, 25 MW, John Cockerill alkaline
sources.author: Virya Energy / John Cockerill
